Arithmetic.title: Arithmetic Aptitude
Arithmetic.overview: Arithmetic aptitude tests your ability to solve basic mathematical problems. Select a sub-topic to see detailed formulas.

Percentage.title: Introduction
Percentage.content: Percentage is a way of expressing a number as a fraction of 100. It is denoted using the percent sign, %.

Percentage.title: Example
Percentage.content: If you scored 45 out of 50, your percentage is (45/50) × 100 = 90%.

Profit & Loss.title: Introduction
Profit & Loss.content: Profit and loss are financial terms used to determine the gain or loss in a transaction.

Profit & Loss.title: Formulas
Profit & Loss.content: Profit = SP - CP; Loss = CP - SP; Profit % = (Profit/CP) × 100; Loss % = (Loss/CP) × 100

Profit & Loss.title: Example
Profit & Loss.content: If CP = 100 and SP = 120, Profit = 20 and Profit % = 20%.

Simple Interest.title: Introduction
Simple Interest.content: Simple Interest is calculated only on the principal amount.

Simple Interest.title: Formula
Simple Interest.content: SI = (P × R × T) / 100, where P = Principal, R = Rate, T = Time.

Compound Interest.title: Introduction
Compound Interest.content: Compound Interest is calculated on the principal and also on the accumulated interest.

Ratio.title: Introduction
Ratio.content: A ratio is a comparison of two quantities by division.

Time & Distance.title: Introduction
Time & Distance.content: Relationship between speed, distance, and time.

Time & Distance.title: Formula
Time & Distance.content: Speed = Distance / Time; km/hr to m/s: multiply by 5/18.

Time & Work.title: Introduction
Time & Work.content: Relationship between number of persons, time taken and amount of work done.

HCF & LCM.title: Introduction
HCF & LCM.content: Highest Common Factor and Lowest Common Multiple concepts.

Number System.title: Introduction
Number System.content: Classification of numbers and divisibility rules.

Ages.title: Introduction
Ages.content: Algebraic approach to solving age-related problems.

Probability.title: Introduction
Probability.content: The likelihood of an event happening.

Reasoning.title: Logical Reasoning
Reasoning.overview: Logical reasoning helps in developing analytical skills through patterns and puzzles.

Number Series.title: Introduction
Number Series.content: A number series is a sequence of numbers following a certain pattern.

Number Series.title: Example
Number Series.content: 2, 4, 8, 16, ? (Answer: 32, as each number is multiplied by 2)

Coding-Decoding.title: Introduction
Coding-Decoding.content: Coding-Decoding involves converting words or numbers according to a specific rule or pattern.

Coding-Decoding.title: Example
Coding-Decoding.content: If CAT is coded as DBU, then DOG is coded as EPH (each letter shifted by 1).

Blood Relation.title: Introduction
Blood Relation.content: Use family tree diagrams to solve complex relationship problems.

Calendar.title: Introduction
Calendar.content: Concepts of leap years, odd days, and day calculation.

Direction.title: Introduction
Direction.content: Tracking movement and final orientation using cardinal directions.

Clock.title: Introduction
Clock.content: Angle between hands and reflection/water images of clocks.

Seating Arrangement.title: Introduction
Seating Arrangement.content: Linear, circular, and square arrangement patterns.

Analogy.title: Introduction
Analogy.content: Finding similar relationships between pairs of words or numbers.

Odd One Out.title: Introduction
Odd One Out.content: Identifying the term that doesn't fit the pattern.

Statement & Conclusion.title: Introduction
Statement & Conclusion.content: Evaluating logical conclusions based on given premises.

Verbal.title: Verbal Ability
Verbal.overview: Verbal ability tests language proficiency and comprehension.

Synonyms.title: Introduction
Synonyms.content: Synonyms are words that have similar meanings.

Antonyms.title: Introduction
Antonyms.content: Antonyms are words that have opposite meanings.

Fill in the Blanks.title: Introduction
Fill in the Blanks.content: Focus on grammar, tenses, and context clues.

One Word Substitution.title: Introduction
One Word Substitution.content: Replacing long sentences with a single precise word.

Reading Comprehension.title: Introduction
Reading Comprehension.content: Analyzing passages and answering questions based on them.

Sentence Correction.title: Introduction
Sentence Correction.content: Identifying and fixing grammatical errors in sentences.
